goal: Design and scaffold a guarded real write-target review flow while keeping real writes, real target selection, real layered writes, persistence, and production Apply integration disabled.

backupPlanModel.behavior: Represents target file path, resolved target path, deterministic future backup path, backup naming policy, backup-required flag, fixture-only flag, and production-disabled flag.

advancedConfirmationModel.behavior: Represents generated-file, script-managed, and symlink-managed warnings plus disabled advanced confirmation state.

verificationPlanModel.behavior: Represents target file, setting id, expected value, reread method, verification status, fixture-only flag, and production-disabled flag.

fixtureReviewProof.behavior: Temporary fixture tests build layered occurrences, candidates, recommendations, guarded review, exact backup plan, advanced confirmation, verification plan, fixture write proof, and fixture verification-passed state.

disabledProductionUi.behavior: Shows disabled Write review, Backup, Verification, Safety, and Review save location UI for layered settings.

uiChanges: Extended disabled layered-setting pre-apply review scaffold with Write review, Backup, Verification, Safety, and disabled Review save location controls.
Added user-facing copy for exact backup, reread verification, advanced confirmation, and real-writing-disabled state.
No production target selection handlers were added.

validation.gitStatusShort: passed with this sprint changes plus pre-existing untracked local audit/design artifacts

proofUsed: Rust models for guarded review, backup planning, advanced confirmation, and verification planning.
Fixture-only end-to-end test composing layered occurrences, candidates, recommendations, backup plan, advanced confirmation, verification plan, fixture write proof, and guarded review.
Source-level tests proving disabled UI controls and no production write_flow integration.
proofStillMissing: No real user config write-target selection is active.
No real layered writes are enabled.
No production backup/write/reread integration is enabled.
No live Hyprland reload or runtime mutation proof is claimed.
nextRecommendedSprint: Keep production guarded review disabled and add a non-writing end-to-end UI review walkthrough that exercises target review decisions against read-only session previews before any real write integration is considered.
